      public boolean isName()
      Description copied from class: WorldKeyOrName
      Returns true if this instance represents a world name (not a namespaced key).

      Get the underlying NamespacedKey if this instance is a key variant.

      Description copied from class: WorldKeyOrName
      Get the underlying world name if this instance is a name variant.

      getName in class WorldKeyOrName

      An Option containing the name when present, otherwise Option.none()

    • asEither

      @NotNull public @NotNull io.vavr.control.Either<org.bukkit.NamespacedKey,String> asEither()
      Description copied from class: WorldKeyOrName
      Represent this value as an Either where the left side is the NamespacedKey and the right side is the world name.
      Specified by:
      asEither in class WorldKeyOrName
      Returns:
      An Either containing either the key (left) or the name (right)

    • usableKey

      @NotNull public @NotNull org.bukkit.NamespacedKey usableKey()
      Description copied from class: WorldKeyOrName
      Get a usable NamespacedKey for this instance.

      If this instance is a key variant, the underlying key is returned. If it is a name variant, an implementation-provided usable key (derived from the name) is returned.

      Specified by:
      usableKey in class WorldKeyOrName
      Returns:
      A non-null NamespacedKey that can be used where a key is required

    • usableName

      @NotNull public @NotNull String usableName()
      Description copied from class: WorldKeyOrName
      Get a usable name for this instance.

      If this instance is a name variant, the underlying name is returned. If it is a key variant, a reasonable string representation derived from the key is returned.

      Specified by:
      usableName in class WorldKeyOrName
      Returns:
      A non-null String representing a usable name

      @NotNull public @NotNull String serialise()
      Description copied from class: WorldKeyOrName
      Serialize this instance to a string form suitable for storage or comparison.
      Specified by:
      serialise in class WorldKeyOrName
      Returns:
      The serialized representation of this value
